title: Trump’s Threats to Europe Put Its Leaders in a Double Bind Over Iran
summary_full: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.
summary_public: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: risk angering voters... face upheaval if they take no action
